events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: trench protection, sloping wrong for soil type per tabulated data, work in progress. Need identify hazards severity immediate controls. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical? Cave-in hazard, potential fatality. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 50? Value not asked 0. Sound etc 0/null. Findings: slope angle exceeds max allowable for soil type; trench not in compliance with OSHA 1926 Subpart P; risk of cave-in. Actions: stop work, evacuate workers from trench, re-slope or bench per tabulated data / competent person, install protective system if needed, inspect by competent person, obtain approval before resuming. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart P, specifically 1926.652(a)(1), 1926.652(b)(1), Appendix B. Need JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.
